reasoning: At 1x the sword is a narrow vertical sliver — instantly readable as 'something long' but not as a distinct charming icon. The pixel art execution is clean and the gold+blue gem palette is pleasant, but swords are inherently edgy rather than round/soft, so toy-charm is capped. On dark backgrounds the warm gold pops well; on the light cream background contrast drops and the silhouette relies on a thin dark outline. Fire details are completely lost at 1x. Edge quality at 4x is good — no mushiness. The gem accent adds the most personality but is too small to register at 1x. Charming in color, weak in silhouette clarity and charm at game scale.
